evals.prompt: Generate the Hotels KPI scorecard for last week's WBR. Today is April 7 2026.
evals.expected_output: A Hotels Weekly Performance Callouts section with the correct date range (Mar 28 - Apr 3 2026), a highlight paragraph summarizing declared and generated revenue WoW movements, and three metric sections (Sessions, Redirects/Session, Revenue/Redirect) each with a RAG emoji, WoW% and YoY%, and bullet-point callouts backed by actual Databricks data.

assertions.text: Output contains 'Hotels Weekly Performance Callouts' header
Output references the correct report period (March 28 or 28 MAR)
Output contains a HIGHLIGHT OF THE WEEK section
Highlight mentions both declared revenue and generated revenue
Output contains a Sessions metric section with WoW%
Output contains a Redirects/Session metric section with WoW%
Output contains a Revenue/Redirect metric section with WoW%
Output uses RAG status emojis (green/orange/red circle)
Sessions section names specific traffic sources
Revenue/Redirect section names specific partners

evals.prompt: Write up the hotel section for WBR for the week of March 20-26 2026.
evals.expected_output: A Hotels Weekly Performance Callouts section for the period 20-26 MAR 2026 with correct metric movements matching approximately: Sessions -15.6% WoW, Redirects/Session +7.4% WoW, Revenue/Redirect ~0% WoW, and narrative callouts about traffic source drivers.

assertions.text: Output contains 'Hotels Weekly Performance Callouts' header
Output references the report period (20 MAR / March 20)
Output contains a HIGHLIGHT OF THE WEEK section
Output contains a Sessions metric section with WoW%
Output contains a Redirects/Session metric section with WoW%
Output contains a Revenue/Redirect metric section with WoW%
Sessions WoW is negative (should be around -15.6% for this week)
Output uses RAG status emojis
Sessions section names specific traffic sources
Revenue/Redirect section names specific partners

evals.prompt: Can you prepare the hotels WBR writeup? The reporting week is March 28 to April 3, 2026.
evals.expected_output: A complete Hotels Weekly Performance Callouts section with real computed numbers queried from Databricks, covering the Highlight of the Week and all three metric callout sections in proper WBR Confluence format.

assertions.text: Output contains 'Hotels Weekly Performance Callouts' header
Output references the report period (March 28 / 28 MAR and April 3)
Output contains a HIGHLIGHT OF THE WEEK section
Highlight mentions both declared revenue and generated revenue
Output contains a Sessions metric section with WoW%
Output contains a Redirects/Session metric section with WoW%
Output contains a Revenue/Redirect metric section with WoW%
Output uses RAG status emojis
Sessions section names specific traffic sources
Revenue/Redirect section names specific partners
